from langchain import LLMChain, PromptTemplate

def handle_request(user_input):
    # Violation: re-instantiating a complex LangChain object per request is highly inefficient
    prompt = PromptTemplate(template="Translate {text}", input_variables=["text"])
    chain = LLMChain(llm=my_llm, prompt=prompt)
    return chain.run(text=user_input)
